front: Philosopher: founder of Academic skepticism whose attitude toward akatalepsia may explain why he did not preserve his writings
Philosopher: one surviving fragment attacks Zeno of Citium's causal theory of perception
Philosopher: pointed to a passage in Plato's Theaetetus to argue that philosophers help people with knowledge like a midwife helps a delivery
Philosopher: sixth scholarch of the Academy who inaugurated its 'Middle' phase
